meaning: adj.不名誉的,不体面的,可耻的
examples: He wouldn't have accepted such an inglorious outcome.
Hunted and penned in an inglorious spot.
But that was in May, before his team suffered an inglorious exit from the 2010 cup.
It will take a herculean effort to hold them in line and prevent an inglorious retreat.
This inglorious episode is not yet over but it will reinforce the average American's contempt for Congress.
